name: Ajvar
recipeIngredient: 6 large Red or green sweet peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Cut the eggplants and peppers into similar-sized pieces.
3. Place the vegetables in a baking dish and season with salt and pepper.
4. Bake for about 45 minutes or until tender when pierced with a fork.
5. Peel the skin from the hot vegetables and chop or mince them.
6. Add minced garlic and lemon juice to the vegetables.
7. Gradually stir in oil, mixing well until the vegetables are evenly coated.
8. Transfer the mixture to a glass dish.
9. Sprinkle with parsley before serving.
Source: Jane Rinear "Our Favorite Recipes" St. Anthony Croatian Catholic Church
